allow: Bash(python -c "import json; import os; files = [f for f in os.listdir\(''.''\) if f.endswith\(''.json''\) and not f.endswith\(''_species.json''\)]; data = [\(f, json.load\(open\(f, ''r'', encoding=''utf-8''\)\)[''id'']\) for f in files]; matches = [f for f, id in data if id in [10309, 10143, 10145, 10318, 10322, 10323, 10264, 10265, 10266, 10267, 10268, 10269, 10270, 10271]]; print\(''\\n''.join\(matches\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\(''./knowledge_base/pokemon.db''\); cursor = conn.cursor\(\); cursor.execute\(""SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=''table'';""\); print\(''\\n''.join\([row[0] for row in cursor.fetchall\(\)]\)\); conn.close\(\)")
Bash(sqlite3 pokemonData.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_records FROM type_effectiveness;")

Bash(sqlite3 pokemonData.db "SELECT t1.name_zh as attacker, t2.name_zh as defender, te.effectiveness FROM type_effectiveness te JOIN types t1 ON te.attacker_type_id = t1.id JOIN types t2 ON te.defender_type_id = t2.id WHERE t1.name_en = ''water'' ORDER BY te.effectiveness DESC, t2.id LIMIT 10;")

Bash(python3 -c "import sqlite3; conn=sqlite3.connect\(''/c/Users/xincu/Desktop/pokemon/knowledge_base/pokemon.db''\); cursor=conn.cursor\(\); cursor.execute\(""SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=''table''""\); tables=cursor.fetchall\(\); print\(''Tables:'', tables\); [print\(f''\\n--- {t[0]} ---''\) or cursor.execute\(f''PRAGMA table_info\(""{t[0]}""\)''\) or print\(''Columns:'', cursor.fetchall\(\)\) or cursor.execute\(f''SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM ""{t[0]}""''\) or print\(''Row count:'', cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]\) for t in tables]; conn.close\(\)")
